cue: Dead hang start, hollow body, chest to bar.
setup: Grip shoulder-width. Active hang — depress + retract before first rep.
exec: Pull from lats. Elbow drives down and back. Chin above bar.
breath: Exhale on pull, inhale on lower.

cue: Body rigid. Full chest stretch at bottom. Rotate fists neutral at top.
setup: Rings at chest height. Body in plank.
exec: Full ROM. Rings move naturally.

cue: Elbows inside knees at bottom. Tall chest throughout. Full depth.
setup: KB held vertically at chest. Feet shoulder-width, toes out 10–30°.
exec: Squat deep. Push knees out.

cue: 2s pause at bottom. Front foot far enough forward.
setup: Rear foot on bench. Front foot 2 steps forward.
exec: Lower controlled. Pause. Drive up.

cue: Hip hinge. KB close to legs. Long spine throughout.
setup: Stand tall. KB at arms' length.
exec: Hinge from hips. Lower KB close to legs. Drive hips forward to return.
breath: Inhale on lower, exhale on stand.
mistakes: Knee bend instead of hip hinge

cue: Lower as slowly as possible. 5+ seconds. Use hands to return.
exec: Keep hips extended. Lower from knees.

cue: Bridge up first. Slide heels in. Lower controlled.
setup: Supine. Heels on sliders. Hips up.
exec: Curl in, controlled return.

cue: Land soft. Max height. Explosive hip extension.
exec: Squat and jump explosively. Land with soft knees.

cue: Strict first 2 reps, push press last 4.
exec: Dip slightly, drive up.

cue: 2s pause at top. Full extension at bottom.
exec: 3s lower, 2s pause at top.

cue: Feet elevated = harder. Full retraction at top.
exec: Pull chest to rings. Hold. Lower slow.

cue: Lean forward 25° = pec emphasis.
setup: Rings at chest height. Forward lean.
exec: Lower controlled, drive up.

cue: Feet elevated. Upper chest emphasis.
exec: Full ROM.

cue: Elbow at 90°, upper arm pinned. Rotate outward only.
setup: Band at elbow height. Elbow pinned to side.
exec: Rotate outward. Control return.

cue: Lower back flat throughout. Exhale each rep. TVA braced.
exec: Extend opposite arm + leg. Back stays flat.

cue: Abductor + glute med. Prevent knee valgus.
exec: Side steps. Keep tension.

cue: Drive through heels. 2s hold at top.
exec: Drive hips up. Squeeze glutes. Hold.

cue: Unilateral. Keep hips level — no rotation toward the lifted leg.
setup: Supine. One foot flat, knee bent. Other leg extended or tucked.
exec: Drive hips up through the planted heel. Squeeze glute. Hold, then lower with control.
prog: Add KB on hip, slow eccentric

cue: Anti-lateral flexion. Stay tall.
exec: Walk. Resist side-lean.

cue: Heels 4in from wall. Lift toes high. Hold 1s.
exec: Full ROM. Control lower.

cue: Full ROM — heel drops below surface. Slow lower.
setup: One foot on elevated surface. Slight knee bend (~20-30°).
exec: Full plantar flexion up. Hold. Lower heel below surface level.

cue: Elastic Achilles. No heel-to-toe roll. Stiff ankles.
exec: Spring from ankle. Small amplitude.

cue: Articulate each vertebra. Light weight only. Not a deadlift.
setup: Standing on step. 5lb DB or lighter.
exec: Curl spine from head down. 5s lower.

cue: Slowest possible. Full shoulder ROM. Never rush this.
exec: Hang, tuck, rotate over.

cue: Full decompression. Active shoulder pack after 10s.
exec: Full hang. Breathe.

cue: Full controlled circle. No passive hanging points in the arc.
setup: Standing. Arm moves through largest possible controlled circle.
exec: Flex → external rotation overhead → extension behind → internal rotation → return.
breath: Slow nasal. One breath per half circle.

cue: Largest circle possible. Pelvis stays level.
setup: Standing on one leg, hand on wall. Raise opposite knee to hip height.
exec: Move hip through largest circle while pelvis stays level.

cue: Slow controlled arc. Stop at any sharp or radiating sensation.
exec: Forward nod → lateral flexion → gentle extension → other lateral → return.

cue: Front and back at 90°. Most restricted movement in training adults.
exec: Hold. Add PAILs.

cue: Full push-up + extra protraction at top. Hold 1s at peak.
exec: Complete push-up. At top, push further to protract fully. Hold 1s.

cue: No elbow bend. Depress + retract only.
exec: Depress and retract scapulas without bending elbows.

cue: Soft elbow. Full chest stretch. Squeeze at top.
exec: Open wide, pause 2s, squeeze closed.

cue: One foot slides lateral. Deep adductor.
exec: Slide laterally into lunge. Return.

cue: Glute med + adductor combined.
exec: Slide laterally. Full ROM.

cue: Rotation from hip. Hip drives the movement.
exec: Rotate from hip, chop diagonal.

cue: Full decompression. Active shoulder pack after 10s.
exec: Full hang. Breathe.

cue: Opposite arm + leg. Keep hips level.
exec: Opposite arm + leg move together.

cue: Posterior tilt first. Then breathe into stretch.
setup: Back knee on mat. Lunge position.
exec: Tuck pelvis, hold and breathe.

cue: Breathe into the outer hip. Do not force floor contact.
setup: From quadruped, bring shin forward parallel to mat.
exec: Lower hips toward mat. Hold. Breathe into front hip.

cue: Wide straddle. Rock forward and side to side.
exec: Rock side to side.

cue: Double inhale, then very long exhale. 3-5 cycles only.
exec: Short sniff then a full inhale on top. Then a long, slow exhale through the mouth.

cue: Foam roller at mid-back only (T6-T8). 2 minutes minimum.
setup: Foam roller perpendicular to spine at mid-back.
exec: Allow gravity to produce thoracic extension over the roller. 2 minutes.

cue: Breath leads. Movement follows. No bracing. This is not training.
setup: Supine. Arms over chest. Knees at 90°.
exec: Extend opposite arm and leg ONLY on the exhale. Return on the inhale.

cue: Lower back and sides expand. Chest stays still.
setup: Prone (face down). Arms folded under forehead.
exec: Breathe slowly and fully into the lower back and sides.

cue: Inhale 4s → hold 7s → exhale 8s. Audible exhale. 4-5 cycles max.
exec: Inhale through nose 4s. Hold 7s. Exhale through mouth 8s.

cue: Combos + footwork + head movement.
exec: Variety of combos.

cue: Breathe leads the movement. Whole spine.
exec: Cow — drop belly, inhale. Cat — round spine, exhale.
breath: Inhale into cow. Exhale into cat.

cue: Movement comes from thoracic spine. Lower back stays still.
exec: Elbow toward opposite wrist, then open to ceiling.
prog: Add reach at end of rotation

cue: Largest circle possible. Movement from the hip, not the torso.
exec: Draw large circles.

cue: Isolate at the ankle. Do not rotate the knee or hip.
setup: Seated or standing on one leg.
exec: Plantar flexion → inversion → dorsiflexion → eversion → return.

cue: Full circle. Isolate at ankle.
setup: Seated or standing on one leg.
exec: Roll through full circle in both directions.
mistakes: Substituting foot pronation for true ankle motion

cue: Let knee drop. Opposite shoulder stays down.
setup: Supine. Bring one knee to chest, cross to opposite side.
exec: Let knee drop toward floor. Hold. Breathe.
breath: Long exhale. Body settles on each exhale.
mistakes: Forcing knee to floor when opposite shoulder lifts

cue: Spine rounds gradually. No bouncing.
exec: Reach forward. Let spine round gradually.

cue: Gentle hug only. Breathe into the lower back.
setup: Supine. One or both knees drawn to chest.
exec: Hug knee gently toward chest. Hold.

cue: Brace throughout. 4s return. Full extension.
exec: Roll out fully. 4s return.

cue: Active hip flexion under load. Tuck first, progress to legs straight.
exec: Push down, raise legs. Hold 10s.

cue: No elbow bend. Push floor away — protract the scapulae fully.
exec: Push floor away — round upper back. Then allow retraction.

cue: Slow controlled arc. Stop at any sharp sensation.
exec: Forward nod → lateral flexion → gentle extension → return.

cue: Full ROM — heel drops below surface. Slow lower.
exec: Full plantar flexion up, full drop down.

cue: Crush grip. Pure grip endurance.
exec: Dead hang 30s.

cue: Hip hinge — not a squat. Glutes drive the swing.
setup: KB on floor in front. Hike it back between legs.
exec: Explosive hip extension. KB floats up. No arm pull.

cue: Lower as slowly as possible. 5+ seconds. Use hands to return.
exec: Keep hips extended. Lower from knees.

cue: 70% load shift to one side. Controlled.
exec: Bend one arm, other stays nearly straight.

cue: Hands on sliders. Upper chest stretch.
exec: Fly wide and back slowly.

cue: Elbows high, braced core. Strength focus.
exec: Deep squat, drive elbows up.

cue: Tiny weight. Y overhead, T sides, W bent.
setup: Prone on bench or floor. 2lb DBs.
exec: 3 positions. Slow and controlled.

cue: Back, elbows, wrists on wall. Slide up. Do not lose contact.
setup: Back against wall. Elbows at 90°. Feet 6 inches out.
exec: Slide arms up maintaining wall contact. Return slowly.

cue: Lunge + rotation + reach. Full kinetic chain.
exec: Hand to instep, rotate, reach up.

cue: Elbows at 45°. Triceps touch floor at bottom — pause 1s. Full extension at top.
setup: Lie on floor. DBs at shoulder width, elbows bent 90°, upper arms on floor.
exec: Press to full extension. Lower until triceps touch floor. 1s pause. Drive up.
breath: Inhale on lower, exhale on press.
prog: Heavier DBs, pause sets, tempo press

cue: Soft elbow throughout. Stretch at bottom is the stimulus. Control the return.
setup: Lie on floor. DBs above chest, palms facing. Slight elbow bend — never fully straight.
exec: Open wide until elbows near floor. Pause 2s at full stretch. Squeeze back to start.
breath: Inhale on open, exhale on close.

cue: 2s pause at top. Full extension at bottom. Heavier than KB allows — use it.
setup: Hinge forward, brace hand on knee or bench. DB hangs at arm's length.
exec: Row to hip. Pause 2s at top. 3s lower to full extension.
breath: Exhale on row, inhale on lower.

cue: Chest on surface eliminates lower back and momentum. Pure mid-back. Full hang at bottom.
setup: Lie chest-down on inclined surface (ottoman, couch arm, or bench at 30–45°). DBs hanging.
exec: Row to lower ribs. Squeeze hard at top 2s. 3s lower to full extension.
breath: Exhale on row, inhale on lower.

cue: Drive from lats, not arms. Full stretch at bottom — feel ribs open. Hips stay down.
setup: Lie on floor or across ottoman. One DB held vertically, both hands cupping base. Arms extended above chest.
exec: Arc DB back over head to full lat stretch. Drive back up from lats. Slight elbow bend throughout.
breath: Inhale on lower, exhale on drive back.

cue: Shoulder behind hip — maximizes long head stretch. Full extension at bottom every rep.
setup: Seated reclined at ~60° (incline chair or against wall at angle). Arms hang fully behind torso.
exec: Curl with full supination. Pause at top. 3s lower to full extension.
breath: Exhale on curl, inhale on lower.

cue: Neutral grip throughout. Targets brachialis — the muscle under the bicep that creates arm thickness.
setup: Standing. DBs at sides, palms facing in (neutral grip).
exec: Curl to shoulder height. 2s lower. Keep wrists neutral — no rotation.
breath: Exhale on curl, inhale on lower.

cue: Lead with elbows. Pinky slightly higher than thumb at top. Slight forward lean.
setup: Standing. DBs at sides. Slight forward hinge (10–15°).
exec: Raise to shoulder height leading with elbows. Pinky slightly higher. 3s lower.
breath: Exhale on raise, inhale on lower.

cue: Hinge forward 45°+. Lead with elbows. Squeeze rear delts at top — not traps.
setup: Hinge forward 45–90°. DBs hanging, palms facing in.
exec: Raise DBs out to sides leading with elbows. Squeeze rear delts 1s at top.
breath: Exhale on raise, inhale on lower.

cue: Elbows point up throughout. Long head stretch is the goal. 3s lower.
setup: Standing or seated. One DB held vertically, both hands supporting base. Elbows overhead.
exec: Lower behind head to full stretch. Drive up to full extension without letting elbows flare.
breath: Inhale on lower, exhale on press.

cue: DBs stay close to legs. Feel hamstring load at top before descending. Long spine.
setup: Stand tall. DBs at thighs, palms facing body.
exec: Hinge from hips. Lower DBs close to legs. Full hamstring stretch at bottom. Drive hips forward to return.
breath: Inhale on lower, exhale on stand.
mistakes: Knee bend instead of hip hinge

cue: DBs at sides. 2s pause at bottom. Front foot far enough forward that shin stays vertical.
setup: Rear foot elevated on bench or couch. Front foot 2 steps forward. DBs held at sides.
exec: Lower controlled. Pause 2s at bottom. Drive up through front heel.
reg: KB Bulgarian Split Squat, reverse lunge
prog: Heavier DBs, pause reps, slow eccentric

cue: Pull to forehead. External rotate at end — thumbs point behind you. Elbows high throughout.
setup: Band anchored at face height. Grab with both hands, palms down.
exec: Pull band to forehead. At end range, externally rotate so thumbs point back. Hold 1s.
breath: Exhale on pull, inhale on return.

cue: Arms straight. Pull to full extension across chest. Squeeze 1s. 3s return.
setup: Stand. Band held at shoulder width, arms extended forward at chest height.
exec: Pull band apart until arms are wide. Hold 1s. 3s controlled return.
breath: Exhale on pull apart, inhale on return.

cue: Same as strict pull-up. Added load demands perfect form — no kipping.
setup: KB hung from dip belt or held between feet. Grip shoulder-width. Dead hang.
exec: Pull from lats. Chest to bar. 3s lower to full hang.
breath: Exhale on pull, inhale on lower.

cue: Dead hang start. Drive knees to chest — pelvis tilts back at top. No swing.
setup: Dead hang from pull-up bar. Shoulder-width grip.
exec: Drive knees to chest. Pelvis tilts back at top. Hold 1s. Lower 3s under control.
breath: Exhale on raise, inhale on lower.
prog: Hanging straight leg raise, toes to bar

cue: Soles together, knees drop out. Lean forward from hip — not spine. Add PAILs for active range.
setup: Seated. Soles of feet together, knees dropped out. Heels 12–18 inches from body.
exec: Lean forward from hips maintaining tall spine. Hold. Add PAILs: press knees into floor 5s, then relax deeper.
breath: Long exhale on lean. Breathe through PAILs.
mistakes: Rounding spine instead of hinging at hip
reg: Wider foot placement (feet further from body)
